basics.name: Chris (Haolin) Qu
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Full-stack and backend engineer with 2+ years of experience designing and scaling distributed systems and data-driven applications using Java, Python, React, and cloud technologies.

work.name: Daxwell
work.summary: Architected and scaled a distributed ERP/CRM platform on AWS EKS.
highlights: Designed a high-consistency transactional engine handling dynamic pricing and contract lifecycle management.
Built real-time supply-demand orchestration using event-driven architecture (Kafka).
Improved platform scalability through containerized microservices, reducing latency by 60%.
Established secure service-to-service authentication (Auth0 OIDC, RBAC) and production-grade observability.
Designed a streaming layer linking IoT, logistics, CRM, and ERP data through Kafka and Flink.

work.name: Xiaomi Technology
highlights: Developed flash sale functionality for the 618 Shopping Festival with Nginx and Redis.
Implemented Apache Kafka and multithreading for asynchronous processing.
Contributed to a high-traffic WeChat account using Kafka dead-letter queue.

work.name: WeBank
highlights: Developed high-performance data system using Redis for financial transactions.
Implemented backend services using RESTful API and Spring Boot.
Implemented microservices architecture using Spring Cloud.

courses: Rapid Prototype Development and Creative Programming
